risk_rating_description: Conditional approval — implement required controls first
approval_status: CONDITIONAL — Deploy only after required controls
business_summary: Anthropic Claude for Enterprise may be deployed conditionally. 0 critical finding(s) require remediation before go-live. Schedule follow-up assessment after controls are implemented.

findings.name: Prompt Injection
findings.finding: HIGH: RAG pipeline detected. Retrieved document chunks are injected into the model context without sanitization.
findings.required_control: Validate and sanitize all retrieved document chunks. Apply instruction-pattern detection before context injection.

findings.name: Sensitive Information Disclosure
findings.finding: LOW: No persistent conversation storage reported by vendor.
findings.required_control: Verify no-storage claim via vendor attestation.

findings.name: Excessive Agency
findings.finding: LOW: No autonomous write actions detected. Read-only access confirmed.
findings.required_control: Monitor for future capability additions by vendor.

findings.name: Supply Chain Vulnerabilities
findings.finding: MEDIUM: No SOC2 report. Penetration test exists but no continuous compliance audit.
findings.required_control: Request SOC2 Type II roadmap with committed timeline.

tprm_summary.data_handling: PASS — No training on user data, 30-day retention policy confirmed
tprm_summary.access_control: PASS — SSO and SCIM supported, OAuth scopes verified minimal
tprm_summary.genai_specific: CONDITIONAL — RAG retrieval boundaries require ACL validation
tprm_summary.incident_response: PASS — SOC2 Type II in progress, breach notification SLA confirmed 72hrs

approval_conditions: Implement chunk-level content filtering on RAG pipeline before go-live
Obtain and review SOC2 Type II report when available
Configure audit log export to SIEM within 30 days of deployment
Add accuracy disclaimer to all model-generated outputs in the UI
assessor_notes: Anthropic Claude Enterprise demonstrates strong baseline security posture. Primary gap is RAG pipeline input sanitization which must be resolved before production deployment. Vendor cooperation was strong throughout assessment process.
